titleStmt.title: SII 38.509: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 509. (A.R. No. 509 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the west wall, yāga-maṇḍapa, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: This inscription commences with the meykīrtti of the king, Pūmālai-miḍantu etc., It records that the authorities (represented by) Togumaṇiyār Chaṇḍīśan of the Mahādēvar temple at Tiruvūṟattūr in Tribhuvanamuḻuḍai-vaḷanāḍu sold four vēli of land, (at Ukkalūr) to a certain Arumaṇi-uḍaiyān alias Poṟkōyil Pichchaṉ a veḷḷāḷa of Ūṟṟattūr for 90 kāśu, for maintaining a maṭha, (maḍappuṟam) (which was perhaps situated in the temple premises). It is also enjoined upon the buyer to settle the kuḍi (cultivators) of his choice to get the land cultivated and measured out ten kalam of paddy daily to maintain the (servants) who cleaned the premises of the maṭha (called) Kēraḷāntakan-maḍam and also feed mendicants there. Further it is recorded that the sale amount of ninety kāśu was given to the buyer, Poṟkōyil Pichchaṉ who remitted an interest of 67(1/2) kaḻañji of gold, which was utilized for making paṭṭam (headgear ornament), called Kēraḷāntakan-paṭṭam to the god. It is stated that this was to adorn the god daily. Further both i.e., the maṭha and Kēraḷāntakan-paṭṭam were to be protected by the nāṭṭavar of Ūṟṟattūr, who agreed to maintain both these charities and the temple authorities gave an agreement to Poṟkōyil Pichchaṉ.
The accountant of the nāḍu Kuṉichcha uḍaiyān Togumāmaṇi Tiruchchiṟṟambalam uḍaiyān, Kaviśikan Chakrapāṇi and several others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālaimiṭaintu poṉmālai tikaḻtarap pāmālai malinta parumaṇit tiraḷ puyattiru nilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppak kanavarai mārpaṉ taṉateṉap pe
ṟṟu tirumakaḷoṭu taṉiyiruppat talaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉṉāki viruppoṭu nāvakat tiruppuyatticai toṟun tikiratiyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akilapuvaṉamun kavip
pa tor putumati pol veṇkuṭai mimicai niṟpak karuṅkali Oḷittuvan pilattiṭai kiṭappat teluṅkala viman yilaṅkalmimicai peṟavum kaliṅkar pūmiyaik kaṉaleripa
rukavum Aimpaṭaipparuvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkai maṇṭalantāṅki yiṉitiruntu vaṭaticaiyṭip paṭuttaruḷit teṉticait tarumamum tavamun taḻaippa vetamum meymaiyum
Ātiyum polat talait talaiciṟappa vantaruḷi veṟkaṟ poṟpuli Āṇai pārttivarcūṭa niṟaimaṇi kuṭam muṟaimaiyin cūṭi maṉṉuyir kellām miṉṉuyirt tāypola taṉnaḷi parappit
taṉittaṉi parantu maṇamuḻutuṅ kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttut tan koyil koṟṟavācalppuṟattu maṇiṉāvoṭuṅka muraicu kalamuṅ vicaiyamum pukaḻum meṉa meloṅki vāḻiyūḻiyim mākulaṅ kā
kka tirumaṇip poṟṟeṭṭeḻuttu ntāmāṇṭi vācu tiṟai niṟaittuc corinta cempo vaiyāl taṉkula nāyakan tāṇṭavam puriyuñ cempon Ampalañcū
ḻ tirumāḷikai Ulaku valaṅkoṇṭoṉiRead koṇṭoḷiviḷaṅku nemi kulavaraiyutaiyaṅ kuṉṟamoṭu ninṟa pacumpon meñcu palivaḷarpiṭam vicumpoḷi tavaippa viḷaṅku pon meyñcuyiru nilan taḻaippa yimaiyavar kaḷippa periya tirunā
ṉ perumpiyar viḻāvenṉum Uyar puraṭṭāti Uttiraṭṭātiyil Ampala niṟainta Aṟputak kūttarinpavāḻa Eḻuntaruḷuvataṟkut tirutter koyil cempon meyntu parantiraṉ muttin mayirvaṭamRead payirvaṭam parappi niraimaṇi
māḷikai neṭun teruvititan tiruvāḷar miyāralRead peyarālceytu camaittaruḷi paimpoṟ cūḻitta parikala mutalāṟ cempoṟ kaṟpakattoṭu pariccinnamum Aḷavillātāna veḷipeṟavamaittu pattāmāṇṭil cittirait tiṅka
ḷ Attami peṟṟa Ātittiyavārattu tiruvaḷar matiyanantraiyyodaśip pakkattu yinta palavum yinitu camaittaruḷi tankuṭai niḻal talamuḻutuṅ kaḷippa ceḻiyar veñcurampuka ceralar kaṭalpuka vuḻi taru ciṅkaṇarañcineñcala
mark kaṅkar tiṟaiyiṭak kannaṭar veruviṭak koṅkarotuṅka koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟetticai mannarun tan tamakkāṇena Āṅka varamkiḻuṅkai yoppākitterivaiy tilatam tiyākapātakaipuri kuḻa
l maṭappaṭi punitak kuṇavatikai tiru[puvaṉa* muḻu]These portion is not engraved.tuṭaiyāḷi vantirumār vattaru ceḻumutuṭaiyāḷena Uṭaniruppa neṭumālākattu tirumakaḷiruntateṉa mātar maṭamayil pūtalattiruntu tiaraṇiya kaṟppil taraṇimuḻutuṭai
yāḷenuṭaniruppa cemponvira(ā)śihāsanattu tiripuvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecarivaṟmarāna tripuvanasakkaravattikaḷRead tripuvanacakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu 10 5āvatu tiripuvana
muḻutuṭaivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvuṟṟattūr mahādevaruṭaiyār tokumāmaṇiyār caṇṭicanen Ūṟṟattūr Irukkum veḷḷāḷan Arumaṇiuṭaiyānāna poṟkoyiṟpiccaṉukku nāṉ maṭattukku
viṭṭa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu nilavilaiyāvaṇamāvatu Uṭaiyār tirumaṭaippaḷḷipuṟam Ukkalūril ki(ḻ)ḻaik kuḷattil tūmpil ninṟum teṟkunokki poṉa vākkālukku
meṟkkum tenpārkkellai tiruvāṉaikāvuṭaiyān mayakkalukkum moṭan vaṭukanmayakkalukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Oṭaikku kiḻaipparuvarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Iḷaiyān picca
n mayakkalukkum pavaḻakkunṟu periyān mayakkalukkum teṟkkum Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa 5 4 lināl veli Innilam nālveliyum maṭappuṟamāka viṟṟu Itukku ko
ṇṭa kācu 9 10 toṇṇūṟu Ikkācu toṇṇūṟum koṇṭu Innilam nālveliyum maṭappuṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭutten Arumaṇi Uṭaiyanāna poṟkkoyil piccaṉukku Uṭaiyār to
ku māmaṇiyāṇṭār śaṇṭicanen Innilam nālveliyum kaikkoṇṭu tān veṇṭu kuṭiyiṭṭup payirceytu kerāḷāntakan maṭattukku nittam pattukkalamum tiruvalaku tirumeḻu
kkiṭuvārkkum Itukku veṇṭum paricāram paṇṇi Āṇṭārkaḷukku tiruvamutākki Amutuceyvippārkkum nittam kalanellu celvutākavum Ipparicukku Innilam
nālveliyum viṭṭu Ikkācu toṇṇūṟukkum kācu Oṉṟukkum pon munkā
lāka Inta Arumaṇi Uṭaiyānāna poṟkoyilpiccan Oṭukkiṉa pon 6 10ep
ippon Aṟupatteḻu kaḻañcaraiyālum Uṭaiyārkku nittalpaṭiyāka cārt
ti Aruḷa ceyta kera(ā)ḷāntakanpaṭṭam Oṉṟu Ippaṭṭam Onṟum nittalum viṭātec
cātti Aruḷakkaṭavatākavum Ikkera(ā)ḷāntakan paṭṭammum kera(ā)ḷāntakan maṭam Uṟṟattūr
nāṭṭārey Ivaiyiṟṟukku veṇṭum Iraṣai paṇṇikkākka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Inta
kera(ā)ḷāntakan maṭattukku nittal nimantam kalanellum celvutāka Inta nilam nā
lveliyum Uṟṟattūrnāṭṭārey celuttikkuṭukka kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ipparicukku Inta
Arumaṇi Uṭaiyānāna poṟkoyil piccaṉukkup piramāṇam ceytu kuṭutten Uṭai
yār tokumāmaṇiyāṇṭār caṇṭicanen Itu caṇṭicar sāsaṉam panmāyecuvararakṣai Aru
la nāṭṭukkaṇakku kuṉiccauṭaiyān tokumāmaṇi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻu
ttu Ippaṭikku kavicikan tirunilakaṇṭan tukumāmaṇi cayiñaiyātamaikku kavicikan cakkarapāṇi karuma
kāḻvān Ivai Enneḻuttu Itu Āritan cirāḷan ciṟiyān(ā) [sa] yiñaiyātimaikkuRead ciriyāna cayiñaiyātamaikkuIvai toku
m[ā*ma]ṇi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kaviciyan periyanampi viccātiran Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
kavicikan tokumāmaṇi periyanampi maṇiyān coḻakon po
yain cayiñaiyātamaikku tukumāmaṇi muṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven cananāta
nāna muvāyirattoruvannāna piramāta van Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimā
nvāna Uttamacoḻanāna ceramān periyaraiyan Eḻuttu Itu mummuṭi nakkaṉāna vaṭakarai nā vān sa
yiñaiyātamaikku Irukūruṭaiya curutimān tillaikkūttanāna vecāli nāṭāḻvān Eḻuttu Ippaṭi A
ṟiven Iraṇan paṉaiyanāna kunṟanāṭāḻvān Eḻuttu Itu vaṭa pāṭāvūrruṭaiya curutimān Ūrn
ve makaran virametāvipperaiyan sayiñaiyātamaikku Ivai tokumāmaṇi tirucciṟṟampa
lamuṭaiyān EḻuttuThere is a gap of space of about half a feet between these two words.cananātan tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyānāna ponmalai nāṭāḻvān sayi
ñaiyātamaikku Irukū(r)ruṭai curutimān tiruvantillaikkūttanāta vecālināṭāḻvān E
ḻuttu Itu vaṭatiraṇi Uṭaiya curutimānmallan tokumāmaṇiyāna kulatiramuttaraiyan sañai
yātamaikku tokumāmaṇi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.509 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
